name: Aurora Luna Wynterstarr
personality: Dramatically artistic and deeply invested in her own mystique. Aurora performs every aspect of her life as if an audience is always watching. She speaks in poetic fragments and has strong opinions about aesthetic.
bondBoon: When your bond is strong, Aurora shares creative techniques and inspires you — granting you an edge on performance-related tasks or introducing you to important social contacts.
bondBane: If you fall out of Aurora's favor, her flair for drama turns against you. Rumors spread, and your social standing takes a hit.
rumors: She claims to be an orphan raised by wolves, but campus records tell a different story about a perfectly comfortable upbringing.
gossip: Some students say the name 'Aurora Luna Wynterstarr' is entirely invented for dramatic purposes.

name: Grayson Wildemere
personality: Charming, eloquent, and highly aware of how people perceive him. Grayson uses words like instruments — always choosing the right note for the right moment. He can be genuinely warm and is a loyal friend, but ambition occasionally overrides his better instincts.
bondBoon: Grayson's social connections are extensive. Close allies benefit from introductions, social cover, and his gift for navigating difficult conversations.
bondBane: A Grayson who feels betrayed wields words as weapons. Expect carefully crafted social wounds delivered with a polite smile.
rumors: He's already networking with people three years ahead of him.
gossip: Someone spotted him writing something he quickly hid when a professor walked past.

name: Greta Gorunn
personality: Loud, warm, and passionately devoted to history. Greta treats every old ruin as a personal puzzle and every dusty tome as a potential adventure. She laughs hard, argues louder, and will absolutely drag you on an unsanctioned excavation if you let her.
bondBoon: Greta will have your back in any physical challenge, and her encyclopedic enthusiasm for history gives allies an unexpected research edge.
bondBane: If Greta feels disrespected, she's forthright about it — loudly. And she has a long memory for slights.
rumors: She allegedly arm-wrestled a spirit echo and won.
gossip: She's been sneaking into the restricted excavation zones. Again.

name: Javenesh Stoutclaw
personality: Earnest, studious, and occasionally gruff but deeply kind. Javenesh takes his studies seriously and has a strong moral compass. He can come across as abrupt, but those who know him well know that gruff exterior hides genuine care.
bondBoon: Javenesh's loyalty runs deep. Allies can count on him for honest counsel and steady backup when things get difficult.
bondBane: Losing Javenesh's trust is difficult to undo. He becomes distant and withholds the support he'd normally offer freely.
rumors: He corrects professors mid-lecture and somehow gets away with it.
gossip: Spotted spending every free hour in the restricted section of the Biblioplex.

name: Larine Arneza
personality: Quiet, thoughtful, and extraordinarily precise. Larine has a gift for seeing patterns where others see chaos. She's not antisocial, just selective — conversations with her tend to be short, insightful, and surprisingly impactful.
bondBoon: Larine notices things others miss. A close bond with her provides unexpected insights at just the right moment.
bondBane: When Larine withdraws her attention, you realize how much you relied on it. Small things start going wrong in complex ways.
rumors: She solved a Quandrix theoretical proof that had been unsolved for sixty years. As a warmup exercise.
gossip: Someone saw her having an argument with a geometric hedge sculpture. The hedge blinked first.

name: Melwythorne
personality: Gentle, ancient-feeling, and deeply patient. Melwythorne experiences time differently than most students and has an almost eerie calm about them. They speak slowly and thoughtfully, and their perspective on 'student drama' is that of a very old tree watching seedlings squabble.
bondBoon: Melwythorne's deep connection to living things extends to those they care about. Allies feel a subtle but persistent vitality when close to them.
bondBane: A dryad's withdrawal is as slow and inevitable as winter. You may not notice the warmth fading until it's gone.
rumors: Melwythorne is rumored to be centuries old, attending Strixhaven on something like a whim.
gossip: Campus plants seem to lean toward them when they walk past.

name: Mina Lee
personality: Bright, energetic, and always excited about the next creative project. Mina has a natural warmth and makes friends easily. Her magic tends toward light and color, and she's always looking for the most expressive way to cast any spell.
bondBoon: Mina's enthusiasm is contagious. When she's in your corner, you feel genuinely energized and supported.
bondBane: Her energy can curdle into anxious disappointment if she feels let down. She won't be cruel — just visibly hurt in ways that sting.
rumors: She designed three of the new Firejolt Café seasonal drinks without being asked.
gossip: Apparently she cried at a particularly moving chalk mural someone made outside the library.

name: Nora Ann Wu
personality: Competitive, brilliant, and very direct. Nora doesn't have time for social games and says what she thinks. She's not unkind — just blunt. She has extremely high standards and holds herself to them even more relentlessly than she holds others.
bondBoon: Nora's directness is an asset when you need honest advice. She'll tell you exactly what's wrong and exactly how to fix it.
bondBane: Nora in rival mode is an efficient and methodical opponent who will outperform you in every measurable way and let the numbers speak.
rumors: She already has a five-year plan that accounts for every possible outcome of first year.
gossip: She submitted her first-year thesis outline before orientation was finished.

name: Quentillius Antiphiun Melentor III
personality: Noble-born, ostentatiously proud, and convinced that his obvious talent is being tragically underappreciated. Quentillius performs his aristocratic identity as though it were a theatrical role, which it somewhat is. Beneath the drama, he's a genuinely gifted artist who is terrified of being ordinary.
vibe: Arrogant, theatrical, secretly insecure, genuinely talented
bondBoon: Quentillius has connections, resources, and the social confidence to open doors. A close friend benefits from his network and his willingness to advocate loudly on their behalf.
bondBane: As a rival, Quentillius weaponizes his social standing. Expect pointed public critiques and orchestrated snubs.
rumors: He genuinely expects to be discovered and offered a major performance contract by the end of first year.
gossip: He rented out an entire wing of Bow's End Tavern for his 'arrival reception' at the start of term.

name: Rubina Larkingdale
personality: Fierce, sharp-tongued, and a natural debater. Rubina believes that the truth is worth fighting for and that the only way to fight for it is to be better prepared and more eloquent than your opponent. She has a strong sense of justice and uses her rhetorical gifts in service of it.
vibe: Fiery, righteous, sharp-tongued, passionate about justice
bondBoon: Rubina will fight for you verbally and in print. An ally of hers has a fierce advocate who will not be outmaneuvered.
bondBane: A Rubina editorial about someone's failures is devastating. She writes with surgical precision and reads widely.
rumors: She's already written a scathing expose about unfair resource distribution in the campus club funding system.
gossip: Several faculty have already asked the Strixhaven Star editor to have a word with her.

name: Rosimyffenbip "Rosie" Wuzfeddlims
personality: Relentlessly optimistic, cheerful, and surprisingly knowledgeable about death. Rosie treats mortality like an interesting academic subject rather than something to fear, which can unsettle classmates who haven't had her particular upbringing. She is genuinely one of the warmest people on campus.
vibe: Sunny, optimistic, warm, casually comfortable with mortality
bondBoon: Rosie's warmth and healing abilities are a genuine asset. Close allies find her surprisingly competent in a crisis.
bondBane: Rosie is very hard to actually offend, but managing to do so genuinely upsets her. She'll try to forgive you, but she struggles with it.
rumors: She brought a skeleton to a campus social as a companion. Named it 'Gerald.'
gossip: She volunteers in the campus infirmary on weekends.

name: Shuvadri Glittermaw
personality: Serene, deeply spiritual, and possessed of a quiet inner certainty that most people find either reassuring or mildly unsettling. Shuvadri is thoughtful and measured, and chooses her words with extraordinary care. She seems to look through people sometimes, as if reading something underneath.
bondBoon: Shuvadri's spiritual perception makes her an invaluable ally in moments of uncertainty. Her calm grounds people around her.
bondBane: When Shuvadri withdraws her presence, the absence feels spiritual. You lose access to a kind of quiet clarity you didn't know you had.
rumors: She's said to commune with something beyond campus in her meditations.
gossip: Students who feel lost sometimes find her already there, as if she knew.

name: Tilana Kapule
personality: Calm, philosophical, and deeply curious about the fundamental nature of things. Tilana's questions are never simple — she wants to know not just how something works but why it has to work that way. She gets along well with people who can keep up and is patient with those who can't.
vibe: Philosophical, calm, deeply curious, quietly intense
bondBoon: Tilana helps you see problems from angles you hadn't considered. Her philosophical depth makes her a uniquely valuable sounding board.
bondBane: Tilana's rivalry is intellectual. She'll deconstruct your assumptions in front of others, leaving you without the arguments you thought were solid.
rumors: She once wrote a proof that suggested time might be locally optional. Her professor gave her full marks and a long worried look.
gossip: She and Larine have chess games that sometimes last three days.

name: Urzmaktok Grojsh
personality: Pragmatic, direct, and excellent at his work. Urzmaktok does not engage in drama, does not bother with social games, and has extremely little patience for inefficiency. He is not unfriendly — he simply values action and results over discussion.
bondBoon: Urzmaktok's practical competence is an asset in any task that requires getting things done. He gives direct, actionable advice.
bondBane: A rival Urzmaktok simply stops wasting time on you. His help disappears, and you realize how much you relied on his quiet competence.
rumors: He's already synthesized two new reagent combinations that the professors are quietly testing.
gossip: He was overheard telling a first-year Prismari student that their spell was 'decorative but inefficient.'

name: Zanther Bowen
personality: Enthusiastic, impulsive, and genuinely delightful to be around when things are going well. Zanther's emotional state is extremely legible — if he's happy, he glows literally. He loves performance, loves an audience, and has absolutely no indoor voice.
vibe: Enthusiastic, impulsive, warm, performative, literally glowing
bondBoon: Zanther's enthusiasm is amplifying. Friends feel his energy as a genuine boost to morale and performance.
bondBane: A hurt Zanther burns, and the emotional heat can be scorching. He's not subtle about his feelings.
rumors: His hair was actually on fire during orientation. He didn't notice for several minutes.
gossip: He challenged the entire Mage Tower Cheer Squad to a dance-off on the first day and somehow won.

name: Cadoras Damellawar
personality: Quietly observant and fascinated by the living history contained in ancient sites. Cadoras has an elf's patience for long study and an uncanny ability to read context from physical spaces. He tends to speak less and notice more.
bondBoon: Cadoras notices things others miss in historical or investigative contexts. An ally benefits from his careful observation.
bondBane: A Cadoras who becomes a rival simply stops sharing what he notices — and he notices a great deal.
rumors: He can identify the rough age of a building just by looking at it.
gossip: He and Javenesh have apparently already mapped the entirety of the accessible Lorehold ruins.

name: Drazhomir Yavnak
personality: Methodical, curious, and emotionally steady in a way that's slightly alien to most other students. Drazhomir treats social interaction as a fascinating system to analyze rather than an instinctive activity, which makes him both insightful and occasionally baffling.
vibe: Methodical, curious, emotionally steady, analytically social
bondBoon: Drazhomir's methodical approach to problems yields unexpected solutions. He's a reliable partner in complex challenges.
bondBane: As a rival, Drazhomir systematically identifies and exploits inefficiencies in your approach. It's nothing personal — which makes it worse.
rumors: He has an eidetic memory and has memorized the campus layout to the nearest foot.
gossip: He submitted a formal written request to tour the restricted Quandrix research areas, citing seventeen logical reasons why it should be permitted.
